author: junomarian
text: Query: Is it possible to start downloading in descending order? Oldest deviation first.

author: mikf
text: All DeviantArt API endpoints only support going from newest to oldest, so implementing this wouldn't be trivial. What do you need this for?

author: junomarian
text: Solved, with --range '710-750' because i wanted to download only 40 deviations from last. There were total 750 deviations.
